---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new agent, skill, pipeline step, or improvement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem / Motivation

What problem does this solve? What's missing from the current pipeline?

## Proposed Solution

How should this work? Be specific about:
- New agent / skill / prompt?
- Changes to existing components?
- New pipeline step?

## Alternatives Considered

Any other approaches you've thought about.

## Component Impact

Which parts of the pipeline would this affect?

- [ ] Pipeline orchestration
- [ ] Content strategy / planning
- [ ] Blog writing
- [ ] Visual rendering
- [ ] Quality review
- [ ] Social posts (LinkedIn / Twitter / Reddit)
- [ ] Video script
- [ ] Archive mechanism
- [ ] Documentation

## Additional Context

Any mockups, examples, or references.
